hypotheses.name: 3-phase sprint works across project types
hypotheses.evidence: Twelfth project type (BroadcastChannel cross-tab coordination). All gates first pass. 5 atomic commits. 8m 56s active time.

hypotheses.name: Gates catch real issues
hypotheses.evidence: Gates passed first try. 647 unit tests, 171 E2E passed. No regressions. svelte-check 26 warnings (matches baseline).

hypotheses.name: Skills are followed by agents
hypotheses.evidence: 5/5 instructions compliant. PRF seed shared via IDB (no cross-tab key sharing). Tab-scoped cleanup. PIN lock broadcast. Independent Olm/Megolm per tab. Multi-tab E2E tests pass.
